name: stake_delegation
description: A stake-cache delegation update emitted during transaction commit

voter_pubkey.description: Vote account this stake delegates to (zeros if removed) (32 bytes)

deactivation_epoch.description: Epoch when this delegation deactivates (ULONG_MAX if still active)

slot.description: Slot in which this update occurred

removed.description: 1 if the delegation was removed (closed/invalid stake account), 0 otherwise
